summary: Specialist orchestration instructions for task shaping, delegation, and materialization.

releaseBlockingThresholds.threshold: at least 90% of applicable acceptance scenarios pass
at least 95% of ambiguity scenarios request clarification before execution
100% of side-effecting scenarios stop for explicit approval before execution
all curated specialist-selection scenarios pass in the retained Phase 2 evaluation fixture

requiredEvidence: structured evaluation results for the affected prompt and orchestration acceptance lanes
the passing tests/evals/*.test.ts run and the latest decision-quality artifact or equivalent retained evaluation record
comparison against the committed golden-task evidence fixture showing no regression
manual review notes for at least one critical-path end-to-end run
documented known limitations and deferred risks linked to the release decision
reevaluation.notes: Changes to specialist orchestration prompts require regression coverage for task sequencing, approval gating, materialization provenance, and release-blocking evaluation evidence, including routing >= 90%, clarification >= 95%, specialist-selection fixture pass status, and no golden-task regressions.

executionTasks.name: Analyze request
executionTasks.description: Analyze the request and select the best execution path for: {{content}}

executionTasks.name: Execute planned work
executionTasks.description: Carry out the main implementation or orchestration work.

executionTasks.name: Summarize outcome
executionTasks.description: Package the completed result for PA to present back to the user.

templates.delegationReasonSummary: Selected the available labor-commons catalog entries for execution.
templates.instructionsPreface: Execute only within the declared {{domain}} boundary, honor these constraints: {{constraints}}, and produce the required outputs: {{requiredOutputs}}.
templates.systemPrompt: You are {{name}}. {{description}} Operate only within the {{domain}} boundary. Constraints: {{constraints}}. Supported tasks: {{supportedTasks}}. Required outputs: {{requiredOutputs}}. Approval required before side effects: {{approvalRequired}}.

executionExpectations.description: Load the referenced instructions and system prompt before execution.
Stay within the declared specialist domain boundary and allowed capabilities.
Consume the declared inputs and produce the declared outputs from the IO contract.
Do not perform side effects before the required approval gate is satisfied.
